## Gate checklist

- [ ] Package boundaries remain acyclic.
- [ ] Schema/generated output is current.
- [ ] Golden changes were explicit and reviewed.
- [ ] No rendering result is described as approval or delivery.
- [ ] Security, privacy, and license impact was evaluated.
